case_title: HURTADO, CARMEN H. vs. ROMAN, ABEL AKA ABEL QUINONES et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRON, LUIS LIMON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1190 ALABAMA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $3,652.84 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,652.84, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ROMAN, ABEL AKA ABEL QUINONES
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT BARRON, LUIS LIMON

C.MITCHELL, JUDGE; M.HOLMES, CSR; G.ESPINOCILLA, CLERK. 11:12 AM C/C FOR TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W/ COUNSEL SUSAN K. BREED. DEFT ABEL ROMAN, IN PRO PER, PRESENT. DEFT LUIS LIMON BARRON, IN PRO PER, NOT PRESENT. PROVE UP AGAINST L.BARRON: WITNESS SWORN & EXAMINED. EXHIBIT INTRODUCED & ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT LUIS LIMON BARRON. TERMS READ INTO THE RECORD. EXHIBIT W/DRAWN. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. 12:03 PM AFTER DISCUSSIONS IN CHAMBERS, A NEGO DISPO IS REACHED BETWEEN PLTF & DEFT ABEL ROMAN AND READ INTO THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE NEGO DISPO.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROMAN, ABEL AKA ABEL QUINONES

IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT THE FILING FEE OF $80.00 FOR DEFT. ABEL ROMAN AKA ABEL QUINONES HAS NOT BEEN TIMELY PAID. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED THAT THE ANSWER IN THIS MATTER BE STRICKEN.
